_comment: Playwright MCP in browser-extension mode: drives the user's own running Chrome/Edge through the 'Playwright MCP Bridge' extension (no separate headless browser). Requires the extension installed; copy its per-profile token into the PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_EXTENSION_TOKEN env var to skip the per-connection approval dialog. Uses `bunx` (not `npx`) because the meta-managed JS runtime is Bun and the bundled `npx` is non-functional. Merge into .claude/settings.json (Claude Code) or claude_desktop_config.json (Claude Desktop). Do NOT commit the literal token — set it in the environment / a gitignored local settings file.
